normalization.notes: Store Canadian Aboriginal Syllabics text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Avoid compatibility substitutions and keep finals as encoded signs rather than Latin letters.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: syllabic signs, orientation-based vowel series, finals, length marks, and dialect-specific series
segmentation.notes: This v1 is scoped to a Plains Cree-oriented path. The Cans script covers many languages and local conventions; do not generalize Cree lesson choices to Inuktitut, Ojibwe, or other syllabics courses.
